name: student
description: طالب جامعي — Standard university student with access to academic services, QR gate entry, and campus wallet.

name: academic_staff
description: هيئة تدريس — Professors and teaching assistants with academic management and request approval capabilities.

name: admin_staff
description: موظف إداري — Administrative and registrar staff with user management, certificate issuance, and request processing.

name: worker
description: عامل — Campus maintenance and operations workers with basic access and request capabilities.

name: visitor
description: زائر — Temporary campus visitors with time-limited QR gate access only.

name: alumni
description: خريج — Graduated students with access to certificates, events, and limited campus services.

name: security
description: أمن — Campus security personnel with gate validation, visitor/vehicle approval, and emergency management.

name: admin
description: مدير النظام — System administrators with full access to all features, analytics, and system configuration.
